task_description: Implement a favorites feature allowing users to save favorite songs using browser localStorage. Includes: favorite button on each track card, a /favorites page, remove favorite functionality, persistence across page refreshes, empty state when no favorites, and navigation link.

verification.summary: npm run build and npm run lint both pass cleanly. No test framework is configured in this project so test_quality is skipped. No Dockerfile present so docker_build is skipped.
